options.name: type
options.description: Set type of clock: `12h` or `24h`

options.name: incrementHours
options.description: Set increment for hours (1, 2, 3, etc.)

options.name: incrementMinutes
options.description: Set increment for minutes (1, 5, 10, 15, etc.)

options.name: autoSwitchToMinutes
options.description: Automatically switch to minutes after selecting hour

options.name: smoothHourSnap
options.description:
Enable smooth hour snapping with animation
In v5.0.0, this will become default and option will be renamed to discreteHourJump (inverted)

options.name: disabledTime
options.type: { minutes?: Array<string | number>; hours?: Array<string | number>; interval?: string | string[]; }
options.description: Disable specific hours/minutes or time intervals

options.name: currentTime
options.type: | { time?: Date; updateInput?: boolean; locales?: string | string[]; preventClockType?: boolean; } | boolean
options.description: Set current time to the input and timepicker

options.name: mode
options.description: Picker mode: analog clock face, scroll wheel spinner, or compact wheel (no header)

options.name: theme
options.description: Theme for the timepicker

options.name: animation
options.description: Enable/disable animations

options.name: backdrop
options.description: Show backdrop when timepicker is open

options.name: mobile
options.description: Force mobile mode

options.name: enableSwitchIcon
options.description: Enable switch icon (mobile ↔ desktop)

options.name: editable
options.description: Allow editing hour/minutes directly

options.name: enableScrollbar
options.description: Enable scrollbar when timepicker is open

options.name: cssClass
options.description: Additional CSS class for the wrapper

options.name: clearButton
options.description: Show clear button to reset time selection

options.name: appendModalSelector
options.description: Selector where to append modal (default: body)

options.name: iconTemplate
options.description: Custom keyboard icon template (desktop → mobile)

options.name: iconTemplateMobile
options.description: Custom schedule icon template (mobile → desktop)

options.name: inline
options.type: { enabled: boolean; containerId: string; showButtons?: boolean; autoUpdate?: boolean; }
options.description: Inline mode configuration

options.name: am
options.description: "AM" label text

options.name: pm
options.description: "PM" label text

options.name: ok
options.description: "OK" button text

options.name: cancel
options.description: "Cancel" button text

options.name: time
options.description: Time label on desktop

options.name: mobileTime
options.description: Time label on mobile

options.name: mobileHour
options.description: Hour label on mobile

options.name: mobileMinute
options.description: Minute label on mobile

options.name: clear
options.description: "Clear" button text

options.name: hourLabel
options.description: Accessible label for the hour spinbutton

options.name: minuteLabel
options.description: Accessible label for the minute spinbutton

options.name: clockLabel
options.description: Accessible label for the analog clock face group

options.name: periodLabel
options.description: Accessible label for the AM/PM period group

options.name: timeLabel
options.description: Accessible label for the time wrapper group / tips

options.name: format24Label
options.description: Accessible label for the 24-hour tips group

options.name: rangeSelectionLabel
options.description: Accessible label for the range selection tablist

options.name: switchToKeyboardLabel
options.description: Accessible label for the keyboard-input switch icon

options.name: switchToClockLabel
options.description: Accessible label for the clock-view switch icon

options.name: toggleLabel
options.description: Accessible label for the generic view toggle button

options.name: timezoneSelectorLabel
options.description: Accessible label for the timezone selector

options.name: announceHour
options.description: Screen-reader announcement prefix for the selected hour

options.name: announceMinute
options.description: Screen-reader announcement prefix for the selected minutes

options.name: announceAmSelected
options.description: Screen-reader announcement when AM is selected

options.name: announcePmSelected
options.description: Screen-reader announcement when PM is selected

options.name: invalidTimeFormat
options.description: Error/announcement text for an invalid time format

options.name: focusInputAfterClose
options.description: Focus input after closing modal

options.name: focusTrap
options.description: Enable focus trap in modal

options.name: delayHandler
options.description: Delay for clickable elements (ms)

options.name: id
options.description: Custom ID for the timepicker instance

timezone.description:
Optional timezone selector for B2B/global use cases.
This is a presentation layer only - no automatic time conversions.

options.name: enabled
options.description: Enable timezone selector UI

options.name: default
options.description:
Default timezone ID (e.g., 'America/New_York')
Uses browser's local timezone if not specified.

options.name: whitelist
options.description:
Whitelist of allowed timezone IDs.
If not provided, uses a curated list of common timezones.

options.name: label
options.description: Label for timezone selector

options.name: placement
options.description:
Popover placement relative to input in compact-wheel mode.
'auto' opens below if space allows, otherwise above.
Defaults to 'auto' in compact-wheel mode.
Can be overridden to 'top' or 'bottom' for fixed positioning.

options.name: hideFooter
options.description:
When true, the footer (OK/Cancel/Clear buttons + switch icon)
is not rendered in the DOM at all. Only works in compact-wheel mode.
Useful when commitOnScroll is enabled and buttons are unnecessary.

options.name: commitOnScroll
options.description:
When enabled, the timepicker automatically commits the selected time
at the end of wheel scrolling, updating the input value and emitting a change event
without requiring the user to press OK. Only applies to wheel and compact-wheel modes.

options.name: hideDisabled
options.description:
When true, disabled hours/minutes are completely removed from the wheel list
instead of being dimmed. Only applies to wheel and compact-wheel modes.
Useful when many values are disabled (e.g., business hours only).

options.name: ignoreOutsideClick
options.description:
When true, clicking outside the picker area does not close it.
Only applies to wheel and compact-wheel modes (popover and modal).
The user must explicitly press OK or Cancel to close the picker.

options.name: enabled
options.description: Enable range mode (from-to selection)

options.name: minDuration
options.description: Minimum duration in minutes

options.name: maxDuration
options.description: Maximum duration in minutes

options.name: fromLabel
options.description: Label for "from" segment

options.name: toLabel
options.description: Label for "to" segment

options.name: onOpen
options.description: Triggered when timepicker opens

options.name: onCancel
options.description: Triggered when user cancels

options.name: onConfirm
options.description: Triggered when user confirms time

options.name: onUpdate
options.description: Triggered during interaction (real-time)

options.name: onSelectHour
options.description: Triggered when hour mode is selected

options.name: onSelectMinute
options.description: Triggered when minute mode is selected

options.name: onSelectAM
options.description: Triggered when AM is selected

options.name: onSelectPM
options.description: Triggered when PM is selected

options.name: onError
options.description: Triggered on invalid time format

options.name: onTimezoneChange
options.description: Triggered when timezone is changed (opt-in feature)

options.name: onRangeConfirm
options.description: Triggered when range is confirmed (range mode only)

options.name: onRangeSwitch
options.description: Triggered when switching between from/to (range mode only)

options.name: onRangeValidation
options.description: Triggered on range validation (range mode only)

options.name: onClear
options.description: Triggered when clear button is clicked

options.name: clearInput
options.description: Whether clicking clear also empties the input field value
